title: 2026 04 02 HackerNews
content: Hacker News highlighted several tech stories: a developer built a visualizer for the leaked Claude Code source, revealing its agent loop and 53 built‑in tools; a “daily sticker” system efficiently manages hardware parts; OpenAI secured a record $122 billion round at an $852 billion valuation, shifting focus to enterprise and AI‑coding tools; debates arose over GitHub uptime data accuracy; OkCupid settled with the FTC over unauthorized photo sharing; Cloudflare launched EmDash, a secure, serverless CMS; PrismML released 1‑bit Bonsai models; CERN developed superconducting karts for LHC maintenance; a blog author quit AI tech, advocating independent blogging; and MiniStack emerged as a free, lightweight local AWS stack replacement.

title: 9家新势力月销超2万，零跑5万理想4万，14大车企月销交卷
content: Nine new‑energy brands sold over 20,000 cars in March; LiAuto topped the chart with 50,000 units and Xpeng followed closely. The overall market saw a noticeable rebound, with most of the 14 domestic firms reporting month‑over‑month growth. Established players such as BYD, Geely, and Great Wall experienced modest declines or stable sales, while new entrants like Nio and Xiaomi launched fresh models that bolstered volumes. In April, additional launches at the Beijing auto show are expected to intensify competition.

title: OpenAI 宣布完成 1220 亿美元融资，估值升至 8520 亿美元
content: OpenAI announced a new funding round of $122 billion, raising its post‑investment valuation to $852 billion. The round reinforces the company’s position as the highest‑valued global startup and signals the start of a high‑capital phase in the large‑model competition, providing significant resources for the company’s future development.

title: Claude Code 开发团队回应源代码泄露：纯属人为失误 将改进自动化流程
content: Claude Code’s source-code leak sparked community excitement. A concerned company sent a DMCA notice to GitHub demanding removal of over 8,100 related repositories, claiming copyright infringement. The leak occurred when unminified map files were mistakenly included in a production build, exposing internal structures. Claude Code’s lead developer, Boris Chelni, admitted the mistake as a human error during manual deployment steps. The team has since improved automation and is reviewing the process to prevent future incidents.

title: 字节 Seed 启动大模型校招 全球招募百位 AI 人才
content: ByteDance’s Seed program has launched a campus recruitment drive for large‑model talent, targeting 2027 graduates and current interns. The initiative will recruit around 100 new candidates worldwide and offers “virtual stock” to enhance long‑term attraction and retention of AI specialists.

title: 曾毓群向上海交通大学捐赠 500 万股宁德时代股票
content: Ningde Times announced that its chairman, Zeng Yuqun, donated 5 million shares of the company’s Class A stock to Shanghai Jiao Tong University’s Education Development Foundation. The shares are unsaleable and were worth over 2 billion yuan at the donation date. Within six years, Zeng has donated more than 3.4 billion yuan to the university. After the donation, Ningde’s largest shareholder, Xiamen Ruiting, reduced its stake from 22.45% to 22.34%. The donated shares and proceeds will support the university’s educational initiatives.

title: 领克汽车宣布为一线职工安排带薪春假
content: Lynk & Co. has announced that its frontline employees will receive a paid spring vacation day on April 1. The leave does not count against annual leave, requires no compensatory days off, and does not affect pay. The move follows government guidance to support school spring breaks and staggered paid leave for workers, and reflects the company’s people‑centric approach, allowing staff to spend more time with family and reduce stress.

title: 小鹏副总裁魏斌已于近期离职
content: Xpeng's Vice President and Intelligent Cockpit Lead, Wei Bin, has recently resigned after taking a leave for family reasons. The company has merged its Intelligent Cockpit Center with the Autonomous Driving Center to form a General Intelligent Center, now overseen by Liu Xianming.

title: 甲骨文持续加码人工智能投入，新一轮裁员数千人
content: Oracle announced a new round of thousands of layoffs, reducing its global workforce to 162,000 as of May 2025. Shares fell 27% this year amid concerns over competitive pressure from generative AI and cash‑flow impacts of infrastructure spending. The company has heavily invested in data‑center capacity to support AI workloads and financed expansion through bond markets. After a $3 trillion deal with OpenAI, remaining obligations surged, and analysts estimate that eliminating 20‑30 k staff could generate $8‑10 billion in incremental free cash flow.***

title: 奇瑞商用车一员工实名举报上级涉嫌职场性骚扰 公司回应
content: A Chery Commercial Vehicle employee filed a real-name complaint alleging verbal abuse and sexual harassment by a manager named Jiang, causing severe anxiety and insomnia. The company issued a statement acknowledging the report, forming a special investigation team, and, following regulatory procedures, dismissed the implicated manager and terminated his employment on March 31. The investigation will continue per law. The manager also holds executive roles in multiple other companies involved in Chery’s commercial automotive operations.

title: Patagonia 客服回应收取「地球使用费」：属实，计划试行一个月
content: Patagonia’s Tmall flagship store announced a “Planet Use Fee” to offset e‑commerce’s environmental impact. Customers pay 15 CNY for the first package and 5 CNY for each additional one at checkout. The fee is refundable if the item is kept; it is withheld and donated to environmental projects if the item is returned. The policy began on April 1, will run for an unspecified period, and is part of the brand’s startup pilot without further comment on the controversy.

title: 一加切换槽位黑砖 9008 了，还能切换回槽位 A 吗
content: The user updated the Oshin module, inadvertently adding a newline that caused the system to reboot repeatedly and display a splash screen. After the reboot landed in TWRP, they tried disabling root but the old firmware couldn’t decrypt it, leaving few options; they chose to reboot and switch partitions. This caused the phone to brick (error 9008). Earlier, a similar issue had forced a factory reset, sparking concern that 9008 could permanently erase data. The user asks if there’s any chance to recover or reset to the same firmware without wiping data.

title: 美国出生公民权听证会的五大要点
content: The U.S. Supreme Court held a hearing on a Trump administration order aiming to redefine American citizenship. While Trump testified for about an hour, the nine justices debated the order’s legality, addressing its implications for citizenship criteria and potential impacts on immigrants and the nation. The deliberations centered on constitutional authority and statutory interpretation, reflecting the court’s role in reviewing executive actions that affect citizenship status.

title: 揪出 Claude Code 源码泄露的人，是个自嘲「门外汉」的华人小哥
content: Anthropic accidentally exposed over 500,000 lines of Claude Code TypeScript in a public release.  The source map file included in the package revealed the location of the source archive, allowing the public to download the full code.  Security researcher Chaofan Shou immediately backed up the leaked files on GitHub (instructkr/claude‑code), which gained 50,000 stars in two hours.  Shou, a Chinese security expert with notable academic and industry experience, highlighted the mistake’s human‑error nature.

title: Claude Code开源第一人，竟是华人辍学博士，CC之父回应：纯手误
content: Claude Code, Anthropic’s AI coding tool, was exposed when a source‑map file was mistakenly uploaded to the npm registry, revealing its 51,200‑line TypeScript code. The leak, discovered by security researcher Chaofan Shou—an ex‑fellow of UC Berkeley who dropped out to start a Web3 security firm—triggered a large public response. Anthropic’s founder, Boris Cherny, blamed a human packaging error, not a Bun runtime bug, and issued a brief apology.

title: 散户乙的“底线思维”：为什么是神华不是陕煤？为什么买长电又卖？
content: The investor, a self‑described “coal novice,” prefers State Power Investment (CPI) because it offers the lowest risk of loss, even in 2015’s industry downturn, when CPI still profited and paid dividends. His decision rests on four questions: worst‑case profitability, business diversification (coal‑electric‑rail), reliable dividend policy (state‑owned majority), and price‑based return (lower PB means higher ROE). He sold Longjiang Power for its higher PB and lower dividend yield, favoring CPI’s high ROE and diversified hedge.

title: 发现 WinServer(2025)才是最轻量的 Win，胜过 LTSC，很适合虚拟机
content: Windows Server 2025 has the lightest Windows build, outpacing LTSC for virtual machines. It includes fewer pre‑installed components—Windows Search is omitted—allowing users to add only what they need. Windows Defender can be removed with a single command, and the firewall does not generate disabled alerts. It starts faster, uses less memory, and now supports Bluetooth natively. Microsoft Store and UWP apps can be installed via wsreset –i.

title: Securing the open source supply chain across GitHub
content: GitHub reports increasing attacks that steal secrets from GitHub Actions workflows to publish malicious packages and expand reach. To mitigate, enable free CodeQL scans on public repositories, avoid `pull_request_target`, pin Actions to commit SHAs, and watch for script injection. Use OpenID Connect tokens instead of secrets and adopt trusted publishing supported by OpenSSF across npm, PyPI, NuGet, etc. GitHub also scans npm for malware. Future plans include enhanced npm security, accelerated Actions protections, and smoother transition to new safeguards.

title: 当世界不太平时，什么资产最赚钱？
content: The report analyzes how major geopolitical conflicts over the past century affect economies and asset performance. It finds that war drives fiscal and monetary expansion, boosts supply‑sensitive commodities, and advantages security‑related sectors like defense, energy, and technology. Bond yields rise while commodity prices surge; stocks of companies linked to supply chains and national security outperform. Investors should shift from efficiency‑to‑security priorities, increase physical assets, and assess supply‑chain resilience when conflict risk climbs.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 火枪骑士

title: SpaceX 已秘密提交 IPO 文件
content: SpaceX has secretly filed a U.S. IPO, aiming to raise more than $75 billion—above earlier estimates of $50 billion. The company plans to list on Nasdaq, with a reported valuation potentially exceeding $1.75 trillion. The filing follows a series of strategic moves, including mergers and military contracts, as Elon Musk positions SpaceX for one of the largest public offerings in history. The company expects to complete the process by next week.

title: Claude Code 安装教程： Mac、Windows、 Linux 从 0 到跑通
content: Claude Code is an official command‑line coding assistant from Anthropic. It works in a project folder, integrating with local files and terminal environments. Installation requires Node 18+; install globally via `npm install -g @anthropic‑ai/claude-code` or run a shell script. After installation, verify with `claude --version`. On macOS, reopen the terminal; on Windows use WSL or Git Bash; on Linux ensure dependencies like libgcc are present. Once in a project directory, run `claude` to authenticate (Anthropic Console, Pro subscription, Bedrock, Vertex) and start coding. Common issues include missing PATH updates and network or account restrictions.

It defines stop‑loss as a tool to preserve gains, lists rule‑based methods (percentage, band, trajectory, position limits) and strategy‑based methods (basic‑fundamental, technical, trading‑plan, grid buying). title: Run multiple agents at once with /fleet in Copilot CLI
content:
Copilot CLI’s /fleet command lets you run several sub‑agents in parallel.  
When invoked, an orchestrator splits a task into independent work items, schedules them according to dependencies, and dispatches sub‑agents to work on separate files or modules simultaneously. Each sub‑agent has its own context and can’t communicate directly; the orchestrator merges their outputs. Good prompts specify clear deliverables, file boundaries, and dependencies, enabling parallel execution and avoiding overwrite conflicts. Use /fleet for multi‑file refactors, docs, or feature‑flag implementation when tasks naturally parallelize.

title: 英国司机如何申请退还隐性贷款费用
content: UK drivers can claim refunds for hidden loan fees by submitting a formal request to the lender or through a debt‑settlement channel. The claim should detail the disputed fee, provide relevant loan documents, and cite regulatory protections that prohibit excessive or undisclosed charges. Once submitted, the lender must review the claim and, if invalidated, refund the amount. Failure to comply may trigger a complaint to the Financial Conduct Authority, which can enforce corrective action.

content: A CMU researcher, Troy Hua, performed an in‑depth analysis of ClaudeCode, a recent open‑source LLM project. He focused on the model’s 7‑layer memory architecture, explaining how a concise 200‑line `MEMORY.md` file underpins the system’s ability to maintain context within the limited attention window. The piece contrasts Hua’s detailed dissection with earlier code‑review posts, highlighting the sophisticated memory design that others find difficult to replicate. The article notes that the code is not a “black technology”—it is a carefully engineered solution to a common LLM limitation.

title: 使用国产 Ai IDE 工具的理由?
content: The author, not a professional programmer, shares why he uses Chinese AI IDEs. He cites company compliance, stable domestic networks, and lower or free costs. He tried several tools—Trae, CodeBuddy, and Qoder—found them all integrated with VS Code and better maintained than antigravity. However, he questions whether any of these domestic tools offer unique, irreplaceable features compared to open-source options like Codex or CodeCatalyst. He hasn’t found a valid reason to replace those.

title: 凌晨6点的裁员邮件，甲骨文3万人被“一键辞退”，26年老员工直言：这种做法真让人觉得恶心、懦弱
content: Oracle sent a mass layoff notice at 6 am on March 31, terminating 20–30 000 employees—about 18% of its workforce—without interviews, warnings, or calls. The terse email stated the role was eliminated as part of a restructuring and appointed a compensation plan. Access to systems was revoked immediately. The decision followed a rapid $58 billion debt raise for AI data centers, with layoffs expected to free $8–10 billion in cash. An 26‑year veteran described the exit as cold and humiliating, highlighting the gap between corporate profit and employee hardship.

title: Claude Code开源发酵：负责人反省，平替版狂飙10万星，Anthropic紧急封杀
content: In April 2024, Claude Code’s source map files were accidentally included in an npm release, exposing 51 million lines of proprietary code. The leak ignited a global rush: developers copied, rewrote, and forked the code, the “claw‑code” project gained 100 k stars in two hours, and more than 9 k forks appeared. Anthropic responded with DMCA takedowns, disabling over 8 k GitHub repositories, but the code survived on decentralized platforms that cannot be removed. This repeated breach challenges the company’s stated AI‑security claims.

title: What Happens When a Public Company Goes All In on AI
content: Block has reorganized its workforce, eliminating over 40 percent of employees, to focus on AI-driven products. The company now uses small squads of three people, supported by AI tools such as Goose and Builder Bot, to replace larger teams. This shift enables rapid development of AI-native services like Money Bot and Manager Bot, which automatically generate customized interfaces for millions of users. The new structure emphasizes autonomous, AI-powered workflows and streamlined product delivery.

title: 国行苹果 AI “回滚”后续：不只是更新推送被撤回，已下载的本地模型也被远程清除
content:
2025年3月31日凌晨，国内部分iPhone用户意外收到了期待已久的Apple Intelligence功能推送，这一"意外惊喜"迅速在科技圈引发热议。 然而，由于苹果尚未获得中国监管部门的正式批准，该功能很快被下线。更令用户意外的是，据博主@数字尾巴爆料，此次撤回行动的深度远超预期——即便用户已将AI大模型下载至本地设备，苹果仍可通过远程指令将其删除。

这一操作方式在业界引发了广泛关注。传统意义上，用户下载到本地的文件通常被视为已脱离云端控制，设备所有者拥有完全处置权。但苹果的此次处理表明，其AI模型的使用权存在更深层的远程管控机制…

title: 1-2 月我国软件业务收入 21534 亿元，同比增长 11.7%
content:
工业和信息化部运行监测协调局发布 “2026 年 1—2 月份软件业运行情况” 指出，2026年前2个月，我国软件和信息技术服务业（以下简称“软件业”）运行态势良好，软件业务收入稳健增长，利润总额增势放缓，软件业务出口增长较快。 一、总体运行情况

前2个月，我国软件业务收入21534亿元，同比增长11.7%。软件业利润总额2693亿元，同比增长7.3%。软件业务出口103.8亿美元，同比增长12.7%。

title: I built Claude Code-lite, a small local-first coding agent CLI runtime inspired by Claude Code
content: The author reverse‑engineered a leaked Claude Code CLI, extracted runtime ideas, and built a smaller, local‑first coding agent called Claude Code‑lite. It offers TUI, REPL, and headless modes, supports OpenAI‑ and Anthropic‑compatible providers, streams output, handles tool calls, stores transcripts, and includes resume/export/cleanup functions. The project prioritizes readable, modular runtime logic—query handling, permission engine, provider abstraction, session management—over UI polish. It is a learning‑focused reference for developers building similar agent runtimes.

title: 请教各位 centos 7.9 通过 devtoolset 启用 c++14/17 时遇到的链接问题
content: In CentOS 7.9 with GCC 4.8.5 only C++11 is available. To use C++14/17 one can use RHEL/CentOS devtoolset, which supplies a newer GCC but not a separate libstdc++.so: the devtoolset’s libstdc++ script delegates to the distro’s shared library and links against the non‑shared archive for additional symbols. Thus, by linking against the OS’s libstdc++.so.6 and the devtoolset’s non‑shared objects, programs can use C++14/17 without glibc conflicts, possibly needing GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI.

title: Butterfly-collecting: The history of an insult (2017)
content: The article examines how the term “butterfly‑collecting” evolved into a sexist insult. It traces its origins in early 20th‑century literature, its usage in mid‑century jazz‑culture critiques, and its diffusion across popular media. The piece analyzes why the phrase implies triviality, objectification, and disrespect toward women, illustrating how language can embed misogynistic attitudes. It concludes that awareness of such metaphors is essential for understanding and challenging gendered harassment.

title: Chess in SQL

title: Claude Pro 订阅封号：原因、规避与申诉全解析
content: Claude Pro users in China face account bans because Anthropic lists China as a prohibited region, treating any use—including via VPN, virtual cards, or local mobile numbers—against policy. Accounts are flagged through a multi‑factor risk model considering payment type, IP source, browser fingerprint, and registration data. U.S. credit cards, Apple Store gift cards, and KYC‑verified virtual cards pose the lowest risk, while domestic cards and shared VPNs trigger high‑chance bans. Appeals succeed in only about 3% of cases, and refunds may be withheld for certain violations.

content: Anthropic admitted that Claude Code was incorrectly charging users, sometimes up to twenty times expected, due to two bugs that broke prompt caching. Users reported unexpectedly high token usage and rapid limit depletion, especially after a recent promotion ended. The company is investigating the issue as a priority and has partially addressed it by rolling back to an older version. The problem has highlighted concerns over consistent service availability and customer support response times.

content: Oracle announced a sudden layoff of up to 30,000 employees (18% of its workforce) after a 95% jump in quarterly profit, striking engineering, cloud, and support roles across the U.S., India, and Europe. The decision came despite strong revenue, as the company seeks to cut costs while investing heavily in AI infrastructure through debt and equity funding. The layoffs represent the largest tech industry single‑day cut, contributing to a 25% drop in Oracle’s stock this year.

title: 智谱、MiniMax：烧钱越猛，市值越高
content: Zhipu and MiniMax’s first post‑IPO earnings reveal two divergent paths for China’s large‑model firms. Zhipu, focused on B2B, spends heavily on research to secure enterprise clients, showing 132 % revenue growth but a 47 billion‑yuan loss and a high R&D ratio. MiniMax, driven by consumer products and overseas sales, achieves 159 % revenue growth with a smaller loss and a stronger global presence, yet remains vulnerable to heavy product‑cycle risk. Both companies face high costs and uncertain profitability, illustrating that technical leadership does not guarantee commercial success.

title: Anthropic 确认 Claude Code 部分源码泄露，相关人员已被解雇
content:
Anthropic 确认在“Claude Code 发布”过程中确实泄露了“部分内部源代码”，共计约 50 万行代码。 一位发言人表示：“此次事件未涉及或泄露任何敏感的客户数据或凭证。这是人为失误导致的发布打包问题，而非安全漏洞。我们正在采取措施以防止此类事件再次发生。”

目前，相关工作人员已被解雇：

我今天被 Anthropic 公司解雇了。

我当时是负责发布最新 dev/claude-code npm 包的工程师。为了改善团队的调试体验，我决定在发布版本中加入源映射。这导致我们整个内部代码库被公开，其中包括数千个文件，其中包含所有代理命令…

title: Claude Code 源码里有意思设定：伪造、投毒、卧底、封号
content: The leaked Claude Code source reveals Anthropic’s defensive and telemetry tactics. It injects fake tools (anti‑distillation) to poison external training data, uses a regex to flag frustrated language, and enforces “undercover” mode that hides internal identifiers when deployed outside Anthropic. API calls include a hash placeholder to verify only official binaries. The client collects extensive device, environment, and usage data for account‑level monitoring, and throttles compaction after a few failures. Debug features such as KAIROS hint at future autonomous agent capabilities.

title: Kubescape 4.0 正式发布

title: 太搞笑了， Claude Code 又双叒叕开源了，是 NPM 的锅吗？
content: Claude Code recently made its source code publicly available via NPM, a mistake that mirrors a similar incident last year when an earlier preview version was leaked. The package is written in TypeScript, distributed globally with `npm install -g`, and its transparent NPM packaging means anyone can inspect the `.tgz` archive. Debug source maps, if not omitted, can also be released accidentally. Even minified code can be de‑obfuscated with LLMs. The author warns that adopting an NPM distribution sacrifices code secrecy, and recommends careful human oversight when relying on AI tools.

title: The Great Claude Code Leak of 2026: Accident, Incompetence, or the Best PR Stunt in AI History?
content: A 2026 npm leak exposed 512,000 lines of Anthropic’s Claude Code, the AI agent harness, due to a missing .npmignore rule, public Cloudflare R2 bucket, and an unpatched Bun bug that shipped source maps. The leak revealed complex tool architecture, a three‑layer memory system, hidden features (KAIROS, ULTRAPLAN, a Tamagotchi‑style “buddy”), and anti‑distillation safeguards. Anthropic issued DMCA takedowns but the code remains widely mirrored. The incident sparked debate over accidental failure versus deliberate PR strategy and highlighted critical release‑pipeline checks.

title: Claude Code 源码泄露，你总被封号的原因找到了，不妨来看看！
content: The leaked Claude Code source reveals that all telemetry sent to Anthropic includes a strong anti‑cheat mechanism. Even when telemetry is disabled, requests carry an attribution header, many identifiers, and a native client attestation (cch) that hashes the first chat message and app version with a hard‑coded salt. The server validates this fingerprint; any modified client or proxy cannot produce the correct token, causing the request to be flagged. Key telemetry channels (Datadog, BigQuery, GrowthBook) are listed, and the analysis explains the precise header contents and hashing algorithm.

title: 凌晨三点，我在排队等一个 AI
content: The article discusses how the rush to use AI models like Seedance 2.0 has turned many workers’ schedules toward “off‑peak” hours, sometimes as late as 3 a.m., to avoid daytime GPU congestion. It highlights that AI consumption requires costly compute, leading SaaS platforms to adopt token‑based pricing and quotas, forcing users to queue. Despite promises of productivity gains, studies show employees often experience increased workload—AI boosts efficiency but also raises overall demand, intensifying work intensity and changing tasks into repetitive review and prompt tinkering.

It follows a prior CMS misconfiguration that exposed a prototype model, highlighting Anthropic’s recurring operational security failures.

Key backers include Amazon ($50 billion), Nvidia ($30 billion), and SoftBank ($30 billion), with Microsoft’s cumulative investment exceeding $13 billion. Despite strong growth in users and revenue, OpenAI remains unprofitable and has shut its high‑cost video tool Sora to focus on text and code services that generate steadier cash flow.
